text: As I move from the first scene of careful technical setup and quiet collaboration behind glass, into this vibrant exhibition space filled with screens and text about research and development, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. There is energy here—a kind of invitation to explore how we innovate and adapt. I am both an observer and participant in this ongoing dance between knowledge, technology, and the human drive to understand and improve our world. It fills me with a quiet excitement to witness the intersection of thought, creativity, and communal progress.
